task_description: Major rewrite of test grader bot to fix critical 0-score scanning bug with multi-method consensus detection, replace per-user sessions with shared test storage, and add robust image preprocessing

verification.summary: All modules import correctly. Full integration test (generate sheet + scan blank) passes with expected 0 score. Shared storage with atomic ID generation works. Active test persistence works across simulated restarts. 3-method consensus scanner functions verified.
